title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Jack Roberts argues that Ideogram 4.0 has solved the text-in-image problem that plagued prior models, claiming it outperforms Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on certain benchmarks while remaining free. He positions it as a viable alternative for designers generating brand assets.
writeup: Jack Roberts evaluates Ideogram 4.0, arguing it has solved the text-in-image problem that affected earlier text-to-image models. The claim matters because reliable text rendering is a persistent weakness in generated images, particularly for design work. Roberts reports that Ideogram 4.0 outperforms Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on certain benchmarks while remaining free, and he positions it as a viable option for designers generating brand assets.
